title: Getting Started with Node.js
content: Node.js is a JavaScript runtime built on Chrome's V8 JavaScript engine. This guide covers installation, basic concepts, and best practices for building scalable applications. You'll learn about modules, the event loop, and asynchronous programming patterns.
excerpt: Master Node.js fundamentals including the event loop, non-blocking I/O, and how to build efficient server-side applications from scratch.

examples.title: Basic HTTP Server
Understanding the Event Loop
Async/Await Pattern

author: Sarah Chen

comments.name: John Dev
comments.description: This guide really helped me understand the event loop. The examples were crystal clear!

comments.name: Sara Frontend
comments.description: Great explanation of async/await. I finally get why callbacks matter. Well written!

comments.name: Mike Backend
comments.description: Good introduction but would love more depth on streams and buffers for large file handling.

comments.name: Anna Full Stack
comments.description: Perfect for beginners like me. Exactly what I needed to get started with Node.js.

title: React Hooks Deep Dive
content: Hooks revolutionized how we write React components. This post explores useState, useEffect, useContext, and custom hooks. We'll cover common pitfalls, performance optimization, and real-world patterns for managing state in functional components.
excerpt: Learn advanced React Hooks patterns, avoid infinite render loops, and master custom hooks for cleaner, more maintainable component code.

examples.title: useState Hook
useEffect with Dependencies
Custom Hook Example

author: Marcus Rodriguez

comments.description: The useEffect dependency array explanation finally makes sense. Thank you!

title: Database Optimization Techniques
content: Slow databases kill user experience. This article covers indexing strategies, query optimization, connection pooling, and caching layers. You'll see concrete examples with MongoDB and PostgreSQL, plus benchmarks showing real performance improvements.
excerpt: Discover proven indexing strategies and query optimization techniques that reduce query time by 10x with real MongoDB and PostgreSQL examples.

examples.title: MongoDB Indexing
PostgreSQL Query Optimization
Connection Pooling

author: James Park

comments.name: Alex DBA
comments.description: The indexing strategies worked perfectly on our production database. Cut query time by 80%!

comments.name: Rachel SQL
comments.description: Really practical examples. The PostgreSQL benchmark comparison was especially useful.

comments.name: Tom Database
comments.description: Good overview but would appreciate more on NoSQL optimization patterns.

comments.name: Nina Performance
comments.description: This saved our startup thousands in infrastructure costs. Highly recommend!

title: CSS Grid vs Flexbox: When to Use Each
content: Confused about layout methods? This guide breaks down when Grid dominates and when Flexbox is the right choice. Includes interactive examples, browser compatibility notes, and practical decision trees for real projects.
excerpt: Stop guessing between Grid and Flexbox. Learn the exact decision tree to choose the right layout method for any design challenge.

MyApp

title: API Design Best Practices
content: Your API is your product's interface. Learn REST principles, versioning strategies, error handling, rate limiting, and documentation standards. This post covers real mistakes from production systems and how to avoid them.
excerpt: Design APIs that scale: master versioning, error handling, rate limiting, and documentation that developers actually want to use.

examples.title: REST Endpoint Design
Error Handling Response
Rate Limiting Middleware

title: Testing in JavaScript: Jest vs Vitest
content: Testing is non-negotiable for maintainable code. This guide compares Jest and Vitest—setup, syntax, performance, and when to use each. Includes unit tests, integration tests, and snapshot testing examples that actually matter.
excerpt: Jest vs Vitest comparison: speed, features, ecosystem, and which one fits your project stack with real benchmark data.

examples.title: Jest Unit Test
Vitest with Async
Mock Functions

comments.description: Good comparison but Jest still has better ecosystem support for my projects.

comments.name: Zara Engineer
comments.description: Comprehensive guide! The snapshot testing section saved me from refactoring nightmares.

title: Understanding TypeScript Generics
content: Generics are confusing until they click. This post breaks down T, extends, keyof, and conditional types with practical examples. You'll see how generics prevent bugs and make your code reusable without sacrificing type safety.
excerpt: Demystify TypeScript Generics with step-by-step examples: T, extends, keyof, and conditional types that make code bulletproof.

examples.title: Basic Generic Function
Generic with Constraints
Conditional Types

title: Docker for Full-Stack Developers
content: Stop saying 'it works on my machine.' Docker containers ensure consistency across development, testing, and production. Learn Dockerfile basics, docker-compose for local development, and deployment strategies that actually work.
excerpt: Containerize your full-stack app: Dockerfile optimization, docker-compose workflows, and production deployment strategies that prevent disasters.

examples.title: Dockerfile for Node.js
examples.code:
FROM node:18-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . .
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ['npm', 'start']

examples.title: Docker Compose Setup
examples.code:
version: '3.8'
services:
  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - '3000:3000'
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@db:5432/mydb
  db:
    image: postgres:14
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=password

examples.title: Build and Run
examples.code:
# Build image
docker build -t myapp:1.0 .

# Run container
docker run -p 3000:3000 myapp:1.0

# Using docker-compose
docker-compose up -d

author: James Park

comments.name: Quinn DevOps
comments.description: Docker finally makes sense! The docker-compose examples saved me from countless environment bugs.

comments.name: Riley Container
comments.description: Perfect for developers new to containerization. The Dockerfile optimization tips were clutch.

comments.name: Sam Infrastructure
comments.description: Solid basics but could use Kubernetes examples for production scaling.

comments.name: Uma Cloud

title: Authentication vs Authorization: Get It Right
content: Most developers confuse these. Authentication proves who you are; authorization decides what you can do. This post covers JWT, OAuth2, session-based auth, and common security mistakes that put user data at risk.
excerpt: Secure your app: Authentication vs Authorization, JWT vs OAuth2, and the 5 critical security mistakes that expose user data.

content: Users leave slow sites. This case study shows real optimizations: code splitting, image optimization, lazy loading, and caching strategies. Includes Lighthouse reports and concrete metrics that matter for conversions.
excerpt: Real case study: how we cut load time from 8 seconds to 2 seconds with code splitting, image optimization, and intelligent caching.
